# barracudawaf_response_pages (Resource)

`barracudawaf_response_pages` manages `Response Page` on the Barracuda Web Application Firewall.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "barracudawaf_response_pages" "demo_response_page" {
    name        = "DemoResponsePage"
    status_code = "404"
    body        = "<html><body><h1>Page Not Found</h1></body></html>"
    headers     = "Content-Type: text/html"
    type        = "default"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- **name** (String) Response Page Name
- **status_code** (String) Status Code

### Optional

- **body** (String) Body
- **headers** (String) Headers
- **id** (String) The ID of this resource.
- **type** (String) Session Token Type
